purpose: Fresh live API/SSE smoke for RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE after OpenRouter credentials were supplied in local ignored env.
secretsPolicy: Secret values were loaded from .env.local/user env and were not written to this evidence file.

commands.command: Start API with node_modules\.bin\tsx.cmd apps/api/src/server.ts on PORT=4108 after loading .env.local
commands.notes: pnpm dev was not used because pnpm attempted auto-install and failed on ignored build scripts; direct tsx reused installed dependencies.

commands.command: node inline smoke: GET /health, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/workspace/agent/tools, POST /api/workspace/agent/propose/stream

done.reasoningPreview: Готов к работе: помогу с задачами, проектами и CRM — просто скажи, что нужно сделать.

coverageImpact.RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE: Narrows real-agent risk from provider-only smoke to authenticated API SSE pass: live OpenRouter provider is configured, /tools reports live/configured, /propose/stream opens text/event-stream and returns reasoning plus done. Remaining evidence is browser UI traversal: real stream rendering, apply/reject UX under live provider, reload/readback, and no silent mock fallback in-browser.
